Tests if the reciprocal of Math.log(1) equals Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the mathematical behavior of the `Math.log` function in JavaScript. It verifies that the result of dividing 1 by the logarithm of 1 is `Infinity`. This is because the logarithm of 1 is 0, and dividing by 0 in JavaScript results in `Infinity`. The code serves as a basic validation to ensure that the `Math.log` function behaves as expected in this specific case.
